title: Display Assigned Users’ Profile Pictures in Calendar, Timeline, and Gantt Views
excerpt: Add a simple but powerful layer of personalization and clarity by showing profile photos next to assigned tasks or events. This would help teams identify who’s responsible for each item at a glance, encouraging quicker c…

posts.author: georgegh (George)
posts.cookedHtml:
Add a simple but powerful layer of personalization and clarity by showing profile photos next to assigned tasks or events. This would help teams identify who’s responsible for each item at a glance, encouraging quicker collaboration and accountability.

Calendar1920×1120 64.1 KB

Timeline1920×995 44.4 KB

Example Use Cases

  • Task Tracking: Quickly see who completed tasks in a specified timeframe.
  • Office Calendar: Display employees’ images for in-office schedules or remote work days.
  • Event Planning: Show who’s attending a company event.

Key Benefits

  1. Instant Recognition – A photo provides immediate clarity on who to contact or follow up with, without hunting for names.
  2. Streamlined Scheduling – Ideal for an office schedule or a company event calendar—quickly see who’s attending or in/out of the office.
  3. Historic Context – On Timeline or Gantt charts, display who completed each task on any given day or week, allowing teams to review workloads and responsibilities.
